Some lies have been saved for years, other hidden for months, many of them will come to light during this special meeting.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on the night of their high school reunion who, a decade after leaving school, still haven't quite grown up.

programme.title: City Slacker
programme.desc: Amanda is a corporate high flier who needs a slacker so she can have a baby and keep her career.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Go West
programme.desc: A crazy group of pioneers brave the harsh elements and numerous mishaps to travel thousands of miles out west to find a place to call home.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A brilliant thief has masterminded a series of high-stake bank heists, and for two detectives, the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Carnage
programme.desc: Two pairs of parents hold a cordial meeting after their sons are involved in a fight, though as their time together progresses, increasingly childish behavior throws the discussion into chaos.

programme.title: American Rackets
programme.desc: In 1978, Rocco "Rocky" Napoli takes control of the family's gambling business from father James "Jimmy Nap" Napoli. Jimmy Nap ran the largest numbers operation in the country for over thirty years. Members of the Genovese crime family, both were arrested in 1988 for the alleged murder plot of Jon Gotti and brother Gene.

programme.title: A Gift Horse
programme.desc: A grieving, young girl works on the local ranch owned by a business tycoon, when a new horse arrives and she takes the opportunity to regain her faith by training it to win.

programme.title: Red Dog
programme.desc: The story of a legendary, lovable red dog who roamed the outback looking for his original master

programme.title: As Dreamers Do The Amazing Life Of Walt Disney
programme.desc: Behind every great mouse there is a man - Armed with an ever growing imagination and eternal optimism, Walt begins to develop skills as an animator early in life. He overcomes a variety of hardships to become one of the biggest icons in the world: Walt Disney.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: The Book And The Rose
programme.desc: John Barnes is about to go off to war in the 1940s. Before he leaves, he acquires an old book filled with intriguing handwritten notes. He begins a correspondence with its previous owner -- and it promises to be more than just an exchange of letters.

programme.title: Beauty and The Billionaire
programme.desc: Addison gets roped into traveling overseas with her brother and his picky billionaire boss. But clashing with the billionaire is no vacation, until he starts to have a change of heart.

programme.title: Finding Love In Sisters
programme.desc: When her mother dies, Esperanza returns to Sisters, Oregon and reunites with her sisters.

programme.title: Three Bullets ... For a Long Gun
programme.desc: Nobody knows his true name, but everybody knows he is the Major, and that when he wants something, he gets it.

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: Six Bounty Killers for a Massacre
programme.desc: The Governor of Kansas hires six gunfighters to overthrow the tyrannical rule of the self-appointed sheriff of Abilene who is holding several hostages including his family.

programme.title: Django Challenges Sartana
programme.desc: Framed for a bank robbery, bounty killer Django's brother, Steve is lynched.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Photographer Holly returns to Gulfport, Mississippi for Christmas. Their traditional holiday light show has been revived again since a hurricane struck five years earlier. She is shocked to learn the festival is run by her high school sweetheart, Mike.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: A month before their wedding, on Christmas Day, Emily is called away for business. When Emily is due to return, a major storm hits making it impossible for her to leave. Emily desperately tries to make it home while Ben gets his act together.

programme.title: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: During the post-war boom period of the late '40s, Willy Loman is an aging, traveling salesman, who despairs that his life his been lived in vain. Facing dispensability and insignificance in a heated, youthful economy, Willy is not ready to part with his cherished fantasies of an America that admires him for personable triumphs in the marketplace.

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: Trying to find a market for her clothing line, designer Skye goes mobile with a 'fashion truck' – but can't drive the truck and run the business all alone. Help comes in the unlikely form of handsome Kevin, an entrepeneur with a history of flipping businesses. As they start on their new quest, Kevin and Skye find that they have more in common than they thought, while their feelings for each other grow stronger.

programme.title: A Love to Remember
programme.desc: After a year of interacting exclusively online, Tenley, an eco-conscious horticulturist, finally works up the courage to meet her online crush, Jared. When Jared doesn't show because of a bike accident, Tenley gets mistaken for his wife at the hospital. Soon, she's forced to keep the lie up with Jared's entire family and his annoyingly charming best friend, Everett in order to save Jared's company... You've Got Mail meets While You Were Sleeping!

programme.title: Casuals: The Story of the Legendary Terrace Fashion
programme.desc: As the 1980s began in Britain, under the radar the 'casual' had already arrived. The film includes recently-unearthed archive footage and gives insightful interviews with personalities like Peter Hooton, who were at the heart of the story at a time when football and fashion mattered more than corporate hospitality and sanitized stadiums.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: Whats Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Infini
programme.desc: Humanity has become the victim of mass overpopulation and the line between middle class and poverty no longer exists. Whit Carmichael has accepted a high-risk security job that requires off-world travel using Slipstream technology in the hope of rising out of his situation. The risk of injury or death is extreme but the danger is sweetened by Whit's dream of a better life for his family.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission. As their telepathic connection to home weakens, they begin to question the morality of the mission and the very meaning of their own existence in the isolation of deep space.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Josh Flagg to create a backyard summer camp-out with the Troop Beverly Hills theme.

programme.title: Magic in Mount Holly
programme.desc: A new gallery owner discovers that she can paint the future using a paintbrush left by Santa.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: A girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) takes her brother (Tyler Humphrey) and dog on an adventure after an angel grants her three wishes.

programme.title: The Maltese Holiday
programme.desc: Two single travelers travel to Malta in search of adventure, and find love along the way.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: Jerry Falk (Jason Biggs), a young writer in New York City, leaves his girlfriend for free-spirited Amanda (Christina Ricci). Seeking advice, Jerry turns to an older, struggling artist who helps him deal with his messy love life.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Between us
programme.desc: Henry and Dianne fear that settling down means giving up on their dreams. It will take the universe conspiring to keep them apart for them to realize just how much they need each other.

programme.title: Tenderness
programme.desc: A detective is determined to unravel the past to discover the truth about a violent man released from prison.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Elizabeth is remodeling her home and hires a contractor. Soon she learns he'd targeted the family all along.

programme.title: Airspeed
programme.desc: After lightening strikes Flight 109, the only chance for survival is a young girl.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: When an inventor turns up dead, his latest invention is stolen: a device able to extract and play memories.

programme.title: Merry Good Enough
programme.desc: Lucy Raulie has always had a complicated relationship with her family, but when her mother disappears on Christmas Eve, the dysfunctional family hit a new all-time low. Aided by her reluctant siblings in an attempt to bring the family back together, the Raulie kids may get more than they bargained for when their eccentric father, George, also shows up to "help" in the search for their wayward mom. A razor-sharp and delightfully heartwarming festive comedy, packed with classic Christmas songs and a stand-out ensemble cast, including Joel Murray (Mad Men), Sawyer Spielberg (Masters of the Air), Susan Gallagher (Cobra Kai), Neil Casey (Ghostbusters, Avenue 5), Comfort Clinton (Billions, FBI), Sophie von Haselberg (Give Me Pity, Pose) and Raye Spielberg.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: Christmas With a Crown
programme.desc: When a successful woman returns to her hometown to revive her family's Christmas festival, she meets a dashing stranger who's volunteered to help organise the event. Sparks begin to fly between them, but little does she know that he's really a prince in disguise, longing to find the true spirit of the holidays! It will take a Christmas miracle of royal proportions for their hearts to meet as one.

programme.title: The Claus Family
programme.desc: After discovering his grandfather is Santa Claus, Jules has to help him deliver his presents all around the world. But Jules' hatred for Christmas might make that more difficult than Santa thought.

programme.title: On Angel Wings
programme.desc: One starry night, a shepherd boy is taken on a secret, magical night-flight to witness a Christmas miracle. Rachel is 8 and for the first time is allowed to join her brothers and sister to visit their grandfather, Amos, as he carries out his annual ritual of a night in the hills, where he worked as a young shepherd boy. Grandfather is delighted to see the children and a special bond is established between him and Rachel. He tells them how she reminds him of a magical night he then proceeds to recount it. He explains how, ahead of the other shepherds protecting their flock with him, he is flown away by the Angel Gabriel, to be the first visitor to the newly born Christ child. This magical re-working of the nativity by the leading writer Michael Morpurgo (War Horse, Private Peaceful) is rich with human poignancy as we share this very special experience.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A young woman who was abducted as an infant, solves her own kidnapping.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A young woman who was abducted as an infant, solves her own kidnapping.

programme.title: Stockholm, Pennsylvania
programme.desc: A young woman, kidnapped as a child, struggles to readjust to life.

programme.title: Stockholm, Pennsylvania
programme.desc: A young woman, kidnapped as a child, struggles to readjust to life.

programme.title: Switched Before Birth
programme.desc: Olivia, pregnant with twins, befriends Anna during IVF journey.

programme.title: Switched Before Birth
programme.desc: Olivia, pregnant with twins, befriends Anna during IVF journey.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: A young woman who was abducted as an infant, solves her own kidnapping.

programme.title: Hostile
programme.desc: A worldwide epidemic has killed most of the planets population. The few survivors struggle to find food and shelter. But they are not alone On her way back to base camp from a scavenging mission, Juliette (Brittany Ashworth) has a terrible accident. Stuck in her car, with a broken leg, in the middle of an unforgiving desert, she must survive the perils of the post-apocalypse, while a strange creature prowls around. . .

programme.title: Puppy Time
programme.desc: Get ready to fall in deep, deep puppy love as we follow a litter of adorable puppies as they play, nap, tumble, eat and play some more. Featuring the world's cutest and most loved and treasured breeds including Pugs, Labradors, Dachshunds and Pekingese - these furry pups will have you laughing, crying, swooning and barking for more as we watch them discover their new world. Pawsitively pawesome!

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Travellers Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. If you could turn back time, could you win back the love of your life? When physics genius Stillman (Asa Butterfield) is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie (Sophie Turner), he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan (Skyler Gisondo) sets off to right every wrong. But some mistakes are too perfect to fix.

programme.title: Moby Dick
programme.desc: [EPISDOE 1/2] Thirsty revenge takes to the high seas in this adaptation of the well-known classic. On board is a stellar crew, including Ethan Hawke, Donald Sutherland and Gillian Anderson. In his quest for a whaling voyage Ishmael joins Captain Ahab and the crew of the Pequod. Soon the true motive of their expedition is revealed ñ to kill the gigantic sperm whale who caused the Captain to lose his leg. Epic!

programme.title: Christmas in the Highlands
programme.desc: A New York sales manager falls in love with the handsome Earl she meets in the Scottish Highlands. Starring Dan Jeannotte (2019)

programme.title: Twinkle All The Way
programme.desc: Two single parents grow closer as they contribute to each other's projects: a wedding and a VIP Christmas party. Starring Sarah Drew (2019)

programme.title: Baking All The Way
programme.desc: A pastry chef arrives in Wisconsin to convince a baker to give her his gingerbread recipe for her new cookbook. Starring Cory Lee (2022)

programme.title: Runaway Christmas Bride
programme.desc: A runaway bride heads to a ski resort for Christmas where she feels an attraction to an Olympic hopeful. Starring Cindy Busby (2017)

programme.title: 3 Holiday Tails
programme.desc: Old flames are reunited at Christmas in Florida, but the man is already engaged, meaning a retired couple and their dogs must help. Stars Julie Gonzalo (2011)

programme.title: 40 Below And Falling
programme.desc: Kate is desperate to get to her wedding, but due to a snowstorm, she is stuck. Will the mysterious mountain man help her get to the church on time or will calamity come Kates why? (2015)

programme.title: Two For The Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer prepares for the biggest race of his life all whilst falling for a local ski instructor. Starring Trevor Donovan (2021)

programme.title: Love, Alaska
programme.desc: Loner Finn has been home for a year but doesn't feel like he fits in. All is about to change when old flame Maggie returns home. (2019)

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: Hollywood star Alex accepts a prom proposal from David an unpopular high school student, to help rebuild her profile. Alex will soon discover the Heidi has a crush on David. (2016)

programme.title: THE SECRET PLACE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: TWENTY ONE DAYS
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star in a tale of murder and unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: CLIMBING HIGH
programme.desc: Diana gets a job in a modelling agency where she meets a wealthy young man, Nicky. Diana's brother is determined that Nicky will marry his sister and the trio set off on a climbing trip together. Will all be resolved?

programme.title: CRACKERJACK
programme.desc: A modern-day Robin Hood is thrilling England by stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. When he unintentionally witnesses a robbery, he becomes aware that a gang of crooks are framing him as the culprit. Will he be able to outwit them?

programme.title: Catch Us If You Can
programme.desc: A free-wheeling, skylarking film about the attempted escape of two youngsters from the fiercely artificial world in which they have become trapped. Steve and his four friends - Lenny, Mike, Rick and Dennis - manage to persuade Dinah, symbol of a nationwide 'Eat Meat' advertising campaign, to escape from the false values of the commercial world.

programme.title: Lying and Stealing
programme.desc: Ivan, a successful art thief, and Elyse, an actress and con-woman, team up to pull off a heist which won't make them rich, but will set them free.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly

programme.title: Elektra

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A man presumed dead shows up after six years, but he may be an imposter, and could choose to hang for murder rather than reveal the truth.

programme.title: Night Train To Lisbon

programme.title: Hard Luck (2006)
programme.desc: Three converging storylines about a drug dealer trying to go straight, a couple who are brutal serial killers, and a middle-age couple exploring their mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Flight Of Fury

programme.title: No Good Deed (2014)
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a one-time district attorney who is kidnapped along with her two children.

programme.title: Get Carter

programme.title: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Los ganadores de los Premios Emmy John Candy y Eugene Levy arremeten contra el mundo de la seguridad privada pero, por desgracia, normalmente van en dirección equivocada! Cuando el torpe policía Frank Dooley (Candy) y el inepto abogado Norman Kane (Levy) pierden sus trabajos, comienzan a trabajar en la Guard Dog Security Company, donde los robos se producen justo debajo de sus narices.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah

When Richie finds himself in Kabul, abandoned, penniless and without his passport, he discovers a young girl with an extraordinary voice and manages her through Afghanistan's version of 'American Idol', the wildly popular 'Afghan Star'.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate

programme.title: Trinayani

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Expedition to Eternal Ice
programme.desc: In the spring of 1930, when Alfred Wegener sets off on his third Greenland expedition, he hopes it will be the crowning glory of his career. Just a few years earlier he created a furore when he published his theory of continental drift now he intends to revolutionise climatic research. For a whole year he and his team will compile data from high in the atmosphere and deep in the ice sheet. This is to be the first long-term climatic study ever carried out, and it marks the beginning of modern climatic research. Some of the scientists will venture far into the interior of the country and even set up a research station on the ice. This, the aptly named Inland Ice, will be 400 km away from the base camp on the West Coast, and specially constructed motorised propeller sleds will be used to transport not only the construction materials for the station but also provisions to see them through the long winter. Wegener has planned the expedition meticulously, down to the tiniest detail – but things don't turn out as he hoped. Right at the start the weather upsets his calculations. He loses six valuable weeks, and it then emerges that the propeller sleds don't work properly. They will have to resort to dog sleds for all their transportation needs. Despite the unfavourable circumstances, the scientists begin work in the middle of the ice sheet… even though they don't have enough provisions for the winter. Supplies are to be brought out to them later, but then the weather takes a dramatic turn for the worse, and Alfred Wegener and his men are faced with a race against time, their very lives at stake. A race they will ultimately lose.

programme.title: The Antarctica Challenge
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mark Terry leads an expedition to Antarctica to report on the new discoveries made by the world's scientific community stationed in Antarctica during International Polar Years (March, 2007 to March, 2009). This award-winning documentary will provide support interviews from polar experts and research scientists around the world as well as rare footage of wildlife. It reveals many startling new scientific revelations such as penguin suicide, new vegetation growing in the world's largest desert, diminishing populations of land animals and marine life and the dangerously increasing melting of Antarctica's land ice. These new discoveries were considered so valuable that this film became the only one invited by the United Nations tom screen to world leaders during the Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen, December, 2009.

programme.title: Wild Poland
programme.desc: Where in Europe are bisons still to be found in the wild? And where do probably more migratory birds breed than in any other European country? The flora and fauna of Poland are full of surprises: the South is dominated by the 2000m peaks of the Tatra, to the North-East the Biebrza river forms one of the largest swamp regions of Europe, a paradise for rare birds like the ruff.

programme.title: Urban Jungle
programme.desc: We think cities belong to us, but the concrete jungle's teaming with animals - whether its monkeys in Japan, sparrows in Germany, Turkish rats or even Manatee in Florida. We make friends with some, but most go about their lives unseen. Some people see wild animals as pests, and dangerous to our health, others believe they are crucial to our well-being and belong here as much as we do.

programme.title: Eagle Lakes
programme.desc: The Lauenburg Lake District is located between Lübeck and Lauenburg on the River Elbe. With more than 470 square kilometres, it is the third largest natural reserve in Schleswig-Holstein. Due to its extensive forest areas, 40 lakes and its proximity to Mecklenburg's biosphere reserve Lake Schalsee, it forms the largest protectoral area alongside the former inner-German border.

programme.title: Wild Serbia
programme.desc: Serbia is in the heart of the Balkans, a “little Europe“ within Europe with its rich variety of landscapes and natural beauties, it certainly does this name justice. This nature documentary presents Serbia's breath-taking, picturesque regions and unique wildlife on a journey to the most beautiful and wildest areas of the Balkan peninsula, from high mountains across gentle hills to the vast plains of the Puszta.

programme.title: Wild Poland

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: As contrasting as the landscapes of the 15th meridian east, so different are its animal inhabitants. What are the living conditions like in the heat of the Namibian Damaraland, in Lusatia or on the coast of Norway? Which challenges do elephants, whales or kingfishers have to master together with their companions from north to south? (S1 E01)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: Almost 11000 kilometres lie between the northernmost and southernmost point of the 15th meridian east. Here you will find extreme landscapes such as the shimmering heat of Africa or the eternal cold of northern Scandinavia. Five people from Spitsbergen, Namibia, Slovenia, Germany and Poland dedicate their lives to environmental protection. (S1 E02)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad? (S1 E03)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation. (S1 E04)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Chiemgau, A Changing Landscape
programme.desc: A few thousand years ago, there were bare moraine ridges and barren meltwater valleys here. A landscape born in the last ice age, characterized by the edge of the Alps, gentle hills, moors, and lakes. And by cultural richness, not only on the islands in Lake Chiemsee, with their famous monasteries and castles. Long before King Ludwig II, the first people settled in the Chiemgau region. Finds of hunting weapons from the Neanderthal era prove that the land was inhabited even during the ice age, probably because there was plenty of game to hunt. During the Bronze Age, one of the most important trade routes from the mountains to the Alpine foothills passed through here. Then came the Celts and the Romans. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Chiemgau, A Changing Landscape
programme.desc: Three times in the past two decades, the Chiemsee area has experienced "once-in-a-century" floods. Climate, wildlife, and landscape have changed, and it seems this transformation is accelerating. Species living in the flood zones are developing sophisticated survival strategies. Knot ants, for instance, place their queen in the middle and form a raft with their bodies, even conquering new habitats. Flooding is less of a disaster for nature and impacts humans more significantly. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: This week two newcomers to the competition are challenging reigning North West champion Matt Worswick. Adam Reid is Head Chef for one of the UKs leading culinary talents Simon Rogan, heading up Simons The French restaurant at Manchesters Midland hotel. (S11 E11)

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and reigning NW champion Matt Worswick has reason to be confident. Last year his fish course was shortlisted for the banquet in the national finals. (S11 E12)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world's strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan's first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World's Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw. (S4 E13)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season's finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan's Wheel and Loading. (S4 E14)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico. (S4 E15)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records! (S4 E16)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year. (S5 E01)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It's a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany. (S5 E02)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O'Hagan (Ireland). (S5 E03)
